_comment: Regression test baseline. Updated by the regression-tester agent. Each key is a test name, value is {status, last_run, notes}.
_note: Validated on e2cd0a2 (sim 19C7CBE5, port 8830). CLI-only run confirmed 0 regressions against 20/36 baseline from sim 6BCC79BB.

pepper connects.notes: ping returns pong, look returns screen data (19 interactive + 12 text elements on Controls tab)

look returns elements.notes: 19 interactive elements on Controls tab, well above 3 minimum

tap by text.notes: Tapped 'List' tab via text strategy, screen changed from Controls to List (title=List)

tap by point.notes: Tapped at (200,400) via hid_touch, navigated to Item 2 detail

back navigation.notes: Navigated back from Item 2 detail to List screen successfully

input text into field.notes: Tapped 'Enter text here' textField, input 'test input 123', verified value='test input 123' in subsequent look

dismiss keyboard.notes: Skipped: dismiss_keyboard command only available via MCP tool. CLI has no equivalent.

scroll down.notes: Scrolled down 200pt successfully, content shifted to show text field and other elements

scroll to element.notes: scroll --element 'Date Picker' returns 'Element not found'. Off-screen elements not discoverable by scroll command.

look scope filtering.notes: look --scope 'Toggles' returns element_count=0 with SCOPE ERROR. Scope filtering doesn't match SwiftUI section headers.

look compact mode.notes: Skipped: compact mode only available via MCP tool (not in pepper-ctl CLI).

find by predicate.notes: Skipped: find command only available via MCP tool.

read element properties.notes: read command requires --id (accessibility ID). No elements in test app expose explicit accessibility IDs.

appearance toggle.notes: FIX CONFIRMED (#977). Dark and light mode toggle via raw cmd, no crash. Previously crashed on system windows.

network monitoring.notes: start/log/stop lifecycle works via raw cmd. log returns empty transactions (no network activity triggered).

network simulate latency.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools to interact with test app UI buttons (slow_request_button).

network simulate fail_status.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools to interact with test app UI buttons (error_request_button).

network simulate fail_error.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools to interact with test app UI buttons (error_request_button).

network simulate throttle.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools to interact with test app UI buttons (slow_request_button).

network simulate offline.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools to interact with test app UI buttons (offline_request_button).

network simulate presets.notes: Returns 6 presets: 3G, Edge, LTE, WiFi, High Latency DNS, 100% Loss. All have correct effects.

network conditions lifecycle.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools for full conditions add/remove/clear cycle verification.

network mock lifecycle.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools to interact with test app mock_request_button.

network clear mocks.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools for full mock add/clear cycle.

network websocket log and status.notes: Skipped: requires MCP tools and test app WebSocket Client screen.

console capture.notes: start/log/stop lifecycle works via raw cmd. Log returned 0 lines (no app activity between start/log).

timeline flight recorder.notes: query last_seconds=30 returns events including screen transitions and commands. Working correctly.

vars inspect.notes: Skipped: vars_inspect command not recognized (may use different cmd name in dylib).

defaults read.notes: Returns 52 UserDefaults entries with keys, values, and types.

snapshot save and diff.notes: snapshot returned 41 elements on Controls tab. Diff not tested (requires MCP).

accessibility audit.notes: Returns audit results: 6 checks run, 3 errors, 4 warnings. No crash.

look on empty screen.notes: Look returns successfully on Misc tab (9 interactive, 23 text). No errors.

tap nonexistent element.notes: Returns clear error: 'Element not found by text: ... not found anywhere in the view hierarchy', no crash
